title: aira flexuosa var. montana
intro: Aira flexuosa var. montana, also known as mountain hair grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Aira flexuosa var. montana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from pain and itching. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions when used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
